text:
Read AGENTS.md first and follow it strictly.

Create the Devspace Mentor AI landing page.

Requirements:

* Modern SaaS landing page
* Dark mode aesthetic
* Inspired by Linear, Vercel, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot
* Premium AI developer tool feel
* Smooth layout hierarchy
* Responsive desktop-first design
* Tailwind + shadcn/ui only

Sections required:

1. Hero Section

* Product title: Devspace Mentor AI
* Headline focused on AI-powered developer onboarding
* Supporting description
* Primary CTA button: "Analyze Repository"
* Secondary CTA button: "View Demo"
* Developer-themed visual/dashboard preview

2. Features Section
   Feature cards for:

* Repository Analysis
* AI Code Explanations
* Learning Paths
* Documentation Generation
* Contribution Suggestions

3. How It Works Section
   Simple 3-step flow:

* Connect Repository
* Analyze Codebase
* Learn and Contribute

4. Testimonials Section
   Mock developer testimonials

5. CTA Section
   Encourage users to get started

6. Footer
   Modern minimal footer with links placeholders

Constraints:

* Preserve the existing app layout system
* Do not introduce new libraries
* Use reusable components
* Keep implementation modular
* Do not add backend logic
* Use realistic placeholder content
* Maintain premium visual polish

Create reusable landing page components where appropriate.
